rows.label: qev015002_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Don't be so unreasonable, Grette.
You can't expect me to go all the way back to NLA
just to fetch a cold cake, can you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0009
rows.name:
If that's the case, then go completely
annihilate those Me-Tsuu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0010
rows.name:
Those bastards who defiled my snack time...
the only sweet moment allowed to me
in this bleak outdoor camping life... I won't let them live![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0011
rows.name:
Even if you say that,
we have to get our hands on the
Noble Silk quickly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Oh, [ST:playername ].
You came back at just the right time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0013
rows.name:
See, those Growth machines called Me-Tsuu
stole every single one of
Grette's cold cakes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0014
rows.name:
When the blood rushes to this young lady's head,
she won't bend her opinion no matter what you do.
I want to do something about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0015
rows.name:
Gathering Noble Silk
or subjugating the Me-Tsuu...
Could you handle one of those for us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_JNK0010
rows.name: Gather Noble Silk

rows.label: qev015002_SEL0011
rows.name: Gather the Noble Silk.

rows.label: qev015002_JNK0020
rows.name: Subjugate Me-Tsuu

rows.label: qev015002_SEL0021
rows.name: Subjugate the Me-Tsuu.

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0016
rows.name:
Thanks! Well then, I'll
go take care of the young lady.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0017
rows.name:
What are you saying, Adelbert!
I do not need you to take care of me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Yes, yes.
Anyway, I'll clear the young lady's grudge right away,
so leave everything to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Well then, [ST:playername ].
I'm leaving the Noble Silk gathering to you.
The Noble Arachnids should have them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0020
rows.name:
You have my gratitude!
I shall make you my servant, second only to Adelbert...
My Second Honorary Servant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0021
rows.name:
Now, go show those lowly Growth dogs
what happens when they defile my supreme snack time...
Make them realize it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Well, this young lady has a foul mouth and attitude,
but she isn't a bad person at her core.
Let it slide, will ya?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0023
rows.name:
What are you saying, Adelbert!
What right do you have
to treat me like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Yes, yes. My bad.
But I don't dislike
that side of you, young lady.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015002_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Well then, [ST:playername ].
I'll leave that to you.
I'm gonna go finish up the job.[ST:wait ]
